title: [MTR4] British Rail Class 158 South Western Railway
description: South Western Railway Class 158 DMU ported from Transport Fever 2 for MTR Mod
body:
![swr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29afc48efeab50147afdb19ceec6a6a82485d979_0.webp)

## Overview
This Resourcepack adds South Western Railway retextures of BR Class 158 in the UK.

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (mtr4)

## Disclaimer
This Resourcepack is not an official product of the UK TOC, including the FGW. Some livery did not apply to real Class 153 train.

## Credits
* Original model: cw_315
* MTR Port: vitor2005
